rawContent:
Tweet by @muellerberndt (Bernhard Mueller)
Author bio: Hacking all the Things since 1997 • AI Research Lead @SherlockDefi
Text: Our small team has worked hard on refining the novel observer-based fundamental theory of Physics, OPH,  over the past 3 months. Still way to go, but we already derive most of existing Physics and parts of the particle spectrum.

https://t.co/eTdYtRMTCK
